gallery.caption: Best times spent with ice cream

bookATable.headline: HUNGRY? WE ARE READY.
bookATable.subtext: Book a table or order now - your next ice cream treat is waiting.

testimonials.text: The ice cream experience is unbeatable! The flavors, the ambiance, and the hospitality—everything was just perfect. Can't wait to visit again!
testimonials.author: Sarah M.

testimonials.text: Best ice cream in town! The vanilla is absolutely divine and the staff is so friendly. My kids love it here!
testimonials.author: John D.

testimonials.text: I've tried many ice cream places but The Creamery stands out. Quality ingredients and amazing flavors. Highly recommended!
testimonials.author: Emily R.

about.headline: About Us
about.description: At The Creamery, we believe that great ice cream starts with the finest ingredients. Our journey began in 2024 with a simple dream: to create the most delicious and memorable ice cream experience for our community.
about.story: What started as a small family recipe has grown into a beloved neighborhood destination. We source our dairy from local farms, use real fruits and premium chocolate, and craft every batch with love. Our flavors are inspired by classic favorites and innovative combinations that surprise and delight.

location.headline: Location & Hours
location.address: Yousuf Ali Building, Dr Daud Pota Rd, Karachi

footer.description: Our ice creams are a symphony of flavors and textures, created from the finest, locally sourced ingredients. With classic favorites like rich, velvety chocolate and creamy vanilla, as well as a diverse range of innovative and exotic options, there's an ice cream to satisfy every palate.
footer.address: Yousuf Ali Building, Dr Daud Pota Rd, Karachi
